mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM BOX_MST WHERE 1=1
AND box_nm LIKE '%' #{searchKeyword} '%'
SELECT BOX_CD, BOX_NUM, a.USER_ID, b.USER_NM, BOX_FLAG, UPD_DT, UPD_ID, RENT_SEQ FROM box_info a LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER_MST b ON a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID WHERE a.BOX_CD = #{boxCd} ORDER BY a.BOX_NUM ASC
SELECT COUNT(a.BOX_NUM) FROM box_info a LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER_MST b ON a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID WHERE a.BOX_CD = #{boxCd}
